title: OEE screens + dispatch workflow (UI)
description: Golden OEE MES journey with workflow.
prompt: Install mes-oee-reference, open OEE operator dashboards, and verify dispatch workflow tasks show in Work Queue.
uiJourney: Solutions → Deploy → Operator OEE tabs → Work Queue
humanSteps: Open Operator app; switch OEE dashboard tabs.
Trigger or open a dispatch workflow; claim task in Work Queue.
